name: Nam Phrik Kaeng Daeng (Red Curry Paste) Ett
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chilies in hot water for 15 minutes and deseed them.
2. In a wok over low heat, dry fry the coriander seeds and cumin seeds for about 5 minutes.
3. Grind the seeds into a powder.
4. Blend the rest of the ingredients except the shrimp paste until well combined.
5. Add the coriander seed-cumin seed mixture and the shrimp paste to the blender; blend again until you have approximately 3/4 cup of a fine-textured paste.
6. Store in a glass jar in the refrigerator for about 3-4 months.
Recipe from: The Elegant Taste of Thailand, by Sisamon Kongpan & Pinyo Srisawat.
